title: aristida ternipes
intro: Aristida ternipes, also known as the three-awn grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Aristida ternipes include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote healing of wounds. In herbal preparations, Aristida ternipes is often used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be dried and used as a powder for various medicinal purposes.
